title: oryctanthus neurophyllus
intro: Oryctanthus neurophyllus, also known as the "Monkey Brush," is a flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Oryctanthus neurophyllus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce swelling and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and decoctions, are traditionally used to treat a range of ailments, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
